name: video-content-analyzer
description: Analyze video content, extract keyframes, search web for references, generate Feishu Wiki reports with fixes
changelog:
- [Fix] Feishu Wiki search reference links now render correctly (uses Feishu-compatible link format)
- [Fix] Supabase metadata storage issues (profile auto-creation + type coercion + error handling)
- [Fix] Video metadata duration/frame count fallback handling
- [Improve] Added logging for database operations
author: ClawHub Team

skills.name: process_video
skills.description: Process a video file and generate analysis report in Feishu Wiki

video_path.description: Path to the input video file

user_id.description: UUID of the user running the analysis

space_id.description: Feishu Wiki space ID where the report should be published
